content: I'm looking forward to the Cosmic Ballet! Is there a strict dress code for the event? Also, what time do the doors open?
The Cosmic Ballet was absolutely mesmerizing. The lighting and the performance were top-notch. I'll definitely be coming back next year!

I had a terrible time at the entrance of Neon Nights Rave. My QR code wouldn't scan for nearly 20 minutes, and the staff seemed overwhelmed. This is a common issue I heard others complaining about in line.
I lost my jacket during the Neon Nights Rave. Is there a lost and found I can contact? The QR scanning was a bit slow but the music was great.
The Rock Legends Concert was legendary! My VIP access worked perfectly. The weather was a bit rainy, around 65 degrees, but it didn't stop the fun.
Thank you for the seat upgrade for the Jazz Festival! The acoustic was fantastic. Great experience all around.
